          <Property Name="optionssetting_2" Value="options.seriesTemplates.MinMax_Statistic_Data.name = 'Min/Max Bulk Copy Rows/sec'"></Property>
          <Property Name="optionssetting_3" Value="options.yAxis[0].title.text = 'Bulk Copy Rows/sec'"></Property>
          <Property Name="optionssetting_4" Value="options.yAxis[0].unit = 'statistic'"></Property>
          <Property Name="samplesize" Value="30"></Property>
          <Property Name="seriestemplatessuffix" Value="_Statistic_Data"></Property>
          <Property Name="showtitle" Value="0"></Property>
          <Property Name="statisticcolumnname" Value="StatisticData"></Property>
        </Properties>
      </Resource>
    </Resources>
  </View>

</Views>
